summary: Iteration 230 - Mixer Content Library Expansion Testing Complete. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). All STOCK_SOURCES expanded to 60 with tier gating, TIER_COMPARISON expanded to 14 rows, AUTO_COMPOSE_GOALS updated with new sources. Frontend: VisualLayersMixer.js has expanded content (12 light modes, 8 video overlays, 12 fractals, 15 filters) with tier tags. All 8 video URLs verified working (HTTP 200). Divine Director (/suanpan) shows 60 sources with 42 unlocked for ultra_player tier.

issues: The /cosmic-mixer page uses CosmicMixerPage.js which has its own LIGHT_MODES (6 modes, no tier tags) instead of the expanded VisualLayersMixer.js constants (12 modes with tier tags). This is a design inconsistency but not a bug - the VisualLayersMixer component is used in CosmicMixer.js component which is rendered elsewhere.

critical_code_review_comments: Backend STOCK_SOURCES correctly expanded to 60 sources with proper tier distribution: 12 discovery, 14 player, 16 ultra_player, 18 sovereign
Backend TIER_COMPARISON correctly expanded to 14 rows including Sound Sources, Video Overlays, Light Modes, Fractals, Visual Filters
Backend AUTO_COMPOSE_GOALS updated with new sources like amb-whale-song, amb-cave-crystal, mantra-heart-sutra
Frontend VisualLayersMixer.js has expanded LIGHT_MODES (12), VIDEO_OVERLAYS (8), FRACTAL_TYPES (12), VISUAL_FILTERS (15) all with tier tags
All 8 video URLs verified working (Pexels CDN returning HTTP 200)
Tier badge rendering implemented in VisualLayersMixer.js picker UI
Note: CosmicMixerPage.js has its own simpler LIGHT_MODES (6 modes) without tier tags - this is separate from VisualLayersMixer
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user at ultra_player tier
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 230 verified the mixer content library expansion: (1) Backend STOCK_SOURCES expanded 21→60 with tier gating working correctly. (2) TIER_COMPARISON expanded 10→14 rows. (3) AUTO_COMPOSE_GOALS updated with new sources. (4) All 6 auto-compose goals working. (5) Frontend VisualLayersMixer.js has expanded content with tier badges. (6) All video URLs working (Pexels CDN). (7) Divine Director (/suanpan) shows sources panel with 60 sources, 42 unlocked for ultra_player. (8) CosmicMixerPage.js (/cosmic-mixer) has its own simpler LIGHT_MODES - this is separate from VisualLayersMixer component.
